title: robiquetia mimus
side_effects: Robiquetia mimus can have side effects if used improperly, such as allergic reactions, respiratory issues, or gastrointestinal problems. Ingesting its extracts can cause nausea, vomiting, and diarrhea, while topical application may lead to skin irritation and rashes. Prolonged exposure to its toxic compounds can also result in headaches, dizziness, and fatigue. Improper use of the plant can exacerbate existing health conditions, such as kidney or liver disease, and even trigger life-threatening complications in severe cases.
